title: Salty Snappy Middle-Eastern Flatbread Pita
description: Classic pita recipe with a crispy crust and fluffy interior, flavored with fresh cilantro and a hint of cumin. Perfect for snacking or serving alongside your favorite dips.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add water, mixing with a wooden spoon until dough comes together.
Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Divide dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired pita size.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Heat a large non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Cook pita for 1-2 minutes on each side, until golden and slightly puffed.
Brush with olive oil and garnish with fresh cilantro leaves.
Repeat with remaining dough pieces, cooking in batches as needed.
